pageContext.name: Lady and the Tramp Love
pageContext.description: The Disney Traditions collection by Jim Shore combines the magic of Disney collectibles with the time-honored motifs of handcrafted folk art. With a love story as pure as gold, this pair of precious pups snuggle together sweetly. With intricate Jim Shore rosemaling and inspiring intimacy, this Lady and the Tramp piece steals hearts. This enchanting Disney collectible is a charming addition to any room.
